tasks.subject: Task 0: Create scrollback buffer service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build a ring buffer that accumulates terminal history client-side.

**Files:**
- Create: `lib/services/terminal/scrollback_buffer.dart`
- Test: `test/services/terminal/scrollback_buffer_test.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/services/terminal/scrollback_buffer.dart", "test/services/terminal/scrollback_buffer_test.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter test test/services/terminal/scrollback_buffer_test.dart", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ring buffer with configurable max lines", "detects scrolled-off lines", "seed history for bulk load", "clear on pane switch"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Reduce capture-pane to visible area only
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Change polling loop to capture only visible pane area instead of 1000 lines.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter run -d android", "acceptanceCriteria": ["capture-pane visible only", "scrollback buffer integrated", "buffer cleared on pane switch"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Use persistent shell for keystrokes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switch keystroke sending from exec() to execPersistent().

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart:1289`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter run -d android", "acceptanceCriteria": ["execPersistent for keystrokes", "no SSH channel overhead per keystroke"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add dedicated input shell to eliminate serialization
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add second persistent shell for input so keystrokes never wait for poll cycle.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/services/ssh/ssh_client.dart`
- Modify: `lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/services/ssh/ssh_client.dart", "lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter run -d android", "acceptanceCriteria": ["second persistent shell for input", "execInput method", "no serialization with polling"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Immediate poll after keystroke + fire-and-forget send-keys
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Trigger immediate poll after keystroke, make send-keys fire-and-forget.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter run -d android", "acceptanceCriteria": ["immediate poll on keystroke", "fire-and-forget send-keys"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Add on-demand scrollback fetch for scroll-up
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When user scrolls to top, one-time bulk capture-pane -S -1000 to seed scrollback.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/screens/terminal/terminal_screen.dart"], "verifyCommand": "flutter run -d android", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scroll-to-top triggers history fetch", "scrollback seeded", "once per scroll"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Verify latency improvement with user
tasks.description:
**Goal:** User confirms latency improved from 2000+ms baseline.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["user confirms latency reduction"], "requiresUserVerification": true, "userVerificationPrompt": "What latency do you see now when connected to a Claude Code session? (baseline was 2000+ms / ~2-3s refresh)"}
```
